sections.paragraph:
βιάζω [βία; act. ‘constrain’, mid. ‘press hard’ or ‘use force’, pass. ‘be hard-pressed’] a precise interpretation of this verb as used in the NT is difficult to establish

—a. mid. force one’s way, rush Lk 16:16; Mt 11:12 can be understood in this way, but b is also considered attractive.

—b. pass. Mt 11:12 be treated forcibly, either positively or negatively.
